## Securities class action lawsuit against Photronics carries September 4, 2026 deadline

Securities class actions create headline risk and potential settlement liability; for PLAB holders, the combination of a legal overhang and the semiconductor cycle exposure warrants a risk-adjusted review of position sizing ahead of the September deadline.

- A securities class action has been filed against PLAB; the investor deadline to join is September 4, 2026.
- The lawsuit is being publicized by Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP, a plaintiff securities firm.
- No details on the alleged violations, class period, or claimed damages appear in the headline.
- Legal risk sits alongside the operational photomask story in the same name.
